rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions referencing component ports in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model
Align helper declaration types with the actual expression types (bool, int, real)
Only generate bounds explicitly stated in requirements and compatible with AGREE types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Component type contracts use assume/guarantee for interface behavior; implementation uses assign/assert for bindings
Use valid AADL identifiers and data types from the model for AGREE expressions
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not invent numeric constraints like x >= 0 unless explicitly required
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
